data.title: New Cayman Islands regulations to take effect on April 1 will require crypto custody and trading companies to obtain a license to operate
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the updated regulations "Virtual Asset Service Providers (Amendment) Regulations" which will come into effect on April 1, 2025, the Cayman Islands will require cryptocurrency custody and trading companies to obtain licenses to operate. Companies already operating in the country must submit applications by June 29, 2025, detailing asset security measures and operational details. It is reported that major cryptocurrency companies such as Coinbase, Binance and Bitwise have already obtained licenses in the Cayman Islands, and some companies such as Sui Foundation have established headquarters there. (Coindesk)

data.title: Movement Public Mainnet Beta Now Live
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Movement Foundation announced that the Movement public mainnet Beta version is now online. For the first time, Movement Network supports permissionless application deployment and user onboarding, and users can build freely on Movement. The launch of the public mainnet Beta version marks the completion of the initial phase of Movement Network, and more features will be launched in the future. It is reported that Movement is a secure and scalable Move-based blockchain protected by Ethereum and cryptoeconomics, building a more secure execution environment through Move (a language similar to Aptos).

data.title: Coinbase to launch 24/7 Bitcoin and Ethereum futures contracts in the U.S.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Coinbase announced that the CFTC-regulated futures exchange Coinbase Derivatives, LLC will launch the first batch of 24/7 Bitcoin and Ethereum futures contracts, allowing American traders to manage risks and seize opportunities uninterruptedly. In addition, Coinbase is also developing a perpetual futures contract to unlock key products that American traders have been missing.

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns 246 Million Tokens on Ethereum
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury executed two significant token burns on the Ethereum blockchain. At 22:53 and 22:54 UTC+8, the Treasury destroyed 102 million and 144 million USDC tokens, respectively, totaling 246 million USDC.

data.title: ETH falls below 2000 USDT
data.description: OKX market data shows that ETH fell below 2000 USDT and is now at 1999.99 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 5.14%. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net outflow of 4,842 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net outflow of 10,779 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net outflow of 4,842 BTC, of ​​which Fidelity had an outflow of 1,768 BTC. Fidelity currently holds 198,199 BTC, worth US$15.86 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net outflow of 10,779 ETH, of which Fidelity had an outflow of 5,497 ETH. Fidelity currently holds 435,069 ETH, worth approximately US$880 million.

data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Drops Below 2,000 USDT with a 5.29% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 10, 2025, 14:53 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has dropped below 2,000 USDT and is now trading at 1,999.439941 USDT, with a narrowed 5.29% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: The floating profit of a whale who shorted BTC 20 times on Hyperliquid has expanded to $8.392 million again
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, the floating profit of a whale that shorted BTC 20 times on Hyperliquid has expanded again to 8.392 million US dollars, which is not far from the psychological profit-taking price of 70475-74192 US dollars. Another drop of 7%-10% will allow him to exit the market with a profit.

data.title: Tech Sector Experiences Significant Market Value Decline
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. stock market's technology sector has experienced a substantial decline, with the market value of the 'seven giants' decreasing by over $3 trillion from recent highs. Strategy's stock fell by 14%, Tesla by 8%, and Palantir by 7%. Alphabet and Broadcom both saw a 5% decrease, while Meta and Nvidia each dropped by 4%. Amazon and Netflix experienced a 3% decline, and Microsoft's stock decreased by 2%.

data.title: DeFi TVL has given back all gains since Trump was elected as US president
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Since Trump was elected President of the United States in November 2024, the total value of cryptocurrencies locked in DeFi protocols (TVL) has completely given up its previous gains. Analyst Miles Deutscher pointed out that since the US election, DeFi TVL soared to US$138 billion on December 17, but fell back to US$92.6 billion by March 10. DefiLlama data shows that Ethereum's TVL has fallen by US$45 billion from its cyclical highs. Despite positive developments in the industry, such as the launch of spot ETFs in the United States and Trump's signing of an executive order to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve, Ethereum's all-time high of US$4,787 in November 2021 has not been broken so far. (Cointelegraph)
